title: 12 PCS Xmas Kraft Gift Bags, 2 Sizes Christmas Paper Bags with Handle, 6 Large 6 Medium Xmas Paper Party Favor Gift Bags for Kids
features: [2 Sizes Christmas Party Bags] Product includes 12 Christmas gift bags with handles, 6 different styles, 2 pieces of each style.27x21x11cm and 21x15x8cm 6 pieces each of large and medium sizes, perfect for Christmas parties, can hold different sizes of gifts

[Cute Christmas Pattern Design] The Christmas gift bag is made of kraft paper with Christmas tree, reindeer, snowflakes, Christmas socks, Father Christmas. The design is cute printed clearly and very festive. Can be used for Christmas, family gatherings, holiday celebrations

[High quality] Christmas gift bags are all made of high quality kraft paper, strong and Sturdy, recyclable. It is unbreakable and can ensure the safety of the gifts inside. Two sizes of bags, large and small, can fit different sizes of Christmas gifts

[Sturdy Handle, Easy to Carry] All Christmas gift bags come with a sturdy handle for easy carrying and can be recycled. The bottom reinforcement design makes the gift bag not easy to break, can well protect the gifts in the bag
[Wide Use]Christmas kraft paper bags are perfect for Christmas decorations, gift wrapping, gift decorations for storing gifts, toys, snacks, candies and more. Make the party special
